title: Moving away from Tailwind, and learning to structure my CSS
summary: Author shares their journey ditching Tailwind for structured vanilla CSS. Matters as devs reconsider utility-first tradeoffs. Takeaway: learn CSS architecture fundamentals before adopting frameworks.

title: SANA-WM, a 2.6B open-source world model for 1-minute 720p video
summary: SANA-WM is a 2.6B parameter open-source world model generating 1-min 720p videos. Matters for devs building video gen/simulation apps. Small enough to fine-tune and deploy locally.

title: Δ-Mem: Efficient Online Memory for Large Language Models
summary: Δ-Mem introduces efficient online memory augmentation for LLMs, enabling continual learning without full retraining. Developers can leverage this for adaptive, context-rich apps with lower compute costs.

title: DeepSeek-V4-Flash means LLM steering is interesting again
summary: DeepSeek-V4-Flash revives interest in LLM steering techniques. Developers can fine-tune model behavior more effectively. Experiment with steering vectors now.

title: US Is Starting to See Heavy Job Losses in Roles Exposed to AI
summary: The US is experiencing significant job losses in AI-exposed roles. Developers should upskill in AI/ML to stay relevant. Build with AI, not against it.

title:
Memory Palace Feature Explanation:
Memory Palace is VoxtrynAI’s advanced long-term memory system…
summary: VoxtrynAI introduced "Memory Palace," a long-term memory system for AI. Matters for devs building stateful AI apps. Explore for persistent context use cases.

title: Why MCP? The Story of How AI Finally Got Its Act Together
summary: MCP (Model Context Protocol) standardizes how AI models connect to external tools/data. Developers get a unified integration layer instead of custom adapters. Adopt MCP to future-proof your AI toolchain.
